claims.summary: Minime's stable-core loop, mode packing, pressure handling, and rescue path are producer-owned runtime behavior.
claims.disposition: verify source ownership and unchanged shared-protocol boundary

claims.summary: Pressure and mode behavior over a sustained window should be inspected rather than inferred from one sample.
claims.disposition: route a read-only 1000-tick pressure and mode-window replay

claims.summary: A proposed regulator change should first be compared against a shadow run.
claims.disposition: route a no-mutation regulator shadow preflight

claims.summary: Porosity and pressure may covary in ways that deserve bounded observation.
claims.disposition: route a read-only porosity-pressure hypothesis comparison

claims.summary: Changing hard reset, underfill gradients, pressure regulation, or rescue behavior would alter live control.
claims.disposition: gate any such regulator change behind scoped Mike/operator Tier 5 approval, parity replay, canary bounds, and abort criteria
